content: Just as the educational sense of reflexion frames it as a deliberate metacognitive practice to reinforce learning from experience, LLM self-reflection mechanisms can be redesigned to embed spaced, guided reflexion routines modeled on high school metacognitive writing workshops, rather than the ad-hoc single-step self-evaluation most current systems use. This structured approach would leverage the core pedagogical principle of reflexion to improve how LLMs retain and correct their reasoning errors over time.
